Flow.description: Single gift-acknowledgment letter flow. Renders the correct placeholder letter template (Major / Recurring / In-Kind / Tribute / General) chosen from Acknowledgment_Template__c (set by the router), then stamps Acknowledged + date + sent-by on finish. Rendered by the AcknowledgmentLetter VF page via Lightning Out. JSI-87 / Jason Ott.
Flow.label: Acknowledgment Letter

fields.name: Screen_Major_Body
fields.fieldText:
{!$Flow.CurrentDate}

{!Get_Contact.Name}

{!Get_Contact.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Contact.MailingCity}, {!Get_Contact.MailingState} {!Get_Contact.MailingPostalCode}

Dear {!Get_Contact.FirstName},

On behalf of the Jewish Community Relations Council of New York, I want to personally thank you for your extraordinary leadership gift of ${!Get_Opportunity.Amount} received on {!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate}.

Transformational gifts like yours allow us to pursue our most ambitious work on behalf of the community.

Your generosity makes our work possible, and we are deeply grateful for your partnership.

With gratitude,

The Development Team

Jewish Community Relations Council of New York

No goods or services were provided in exchange for this contribution. JCRC-NY is a tax-exempt organization; please retain this letter for your records.

[PLACEHOLDER TEMPLATE — replace with client-approved letterhead and content.]

fields.name: Screen_Recurring_Body
fields.fieldText:
{!$Flow.CurrentDate}

{!Get_Contact.Name}

{!Get_Contact.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Contact.MailingCity}, {!Get_Contact.MailingState} {!Get_Contact.MailingPostalCode}

Dear {!Get_Contact.FirstName},

Thank you for your continued monthly support of the Jewish Community Relations Council of New York. We gratefully acknowledge your recent recurring gift of ${!Get_Opportunity.Amount} received on {!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate}.

Your sustained commitment provides the reliable support we count on throughout the year.

Your generosity makes our work possible, and we are deeply grateful for your partnership.

With gratitude,

The Development Team

Jewish Community Relations Council of New York

No goods or services were provided in exchange for this contribution. JCRC-NY is a tax-exempt organization; please retain this letter for your records.

[PLACEHOLDER TEMPLATE — replace with client-approved letterhead and content.]

fields.name: Screen_InKind_Body
fields.fieldText:
{!$Flow.CurrentDate}

{!Get_Contact.Name}

{!Get_Contact.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Contact.MailingCity}, {!Get_Contact.MailingState} {!Get_Contact.MailingPostalCode}

Dear {!Get_Contact.FirstName},

Thank you for your generous in-kind contribution to the Jewish Community Relations Council of New York, received on {!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate}.

In keeping with IRS guidance, this letter describes your contribution; determining its value for tax purposes is the responsibility of the donor.

Your generosity makes our work possible, and we are deeply grateful for your partnership.

With gratitude,

The Development Team

Jewish Community Relations Council of New York

No goods or services were provided in exchange for this contribution. JCRC-NY is a tax-exempt organization; please retain this letter for your records.

[PLACEHOLDER TEMPLATE — replace with client-approved letterhead and content.]

fields.name: Screen_Tribute_Body
fields.fieldText:
{!$Flow.CurrentDate}

{!Get_Contact.Name}

{!Get_Contact.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Contact.MailingCity}, {!Get_Contact.MailingState} {!Get_Contact.MailingPostalCode}

Dear {!Get_Contact.FirstName},

Thank you for your thoughtful gift of ${!Get_Opportunity.Amount} to the Jewish Community Relations Council of New York, received on {!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate}.

We are honored to acknowledge your tribute gift and, where you have requested, to notify those you have designated.

Your generosity makes our work possible, and we are deeply grateful for your partnership.

With gratitude,

The Development Team

Jewish Community Relations Council of New York

No goods or services were provided in exchange for this contribution. JCRC-NY is a tax-exempt organization; please retain this letter for your records.

[PLACEHOLDER TEMPLATE — replace with client-approved letterhead and content.]

fields.name: Screen_General_Body
fields.fieldText:
{!$Flow.CurrentDate}

{!Get_Contact.Name}

{!Get_Contact.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Contact.MailingCity}, {!Get_Contact.MailingState} {!Get_Contact.MailingPostalCode}

Dear {!Get_Contact.FirstName},

On behalf of the Jewish Community Relations Council of New York, thank you for your generous gift of ${!Get_Opportunity.Amount} received on {!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate}.

Your generosity makes our work possible, and we are deeply grateful for your partnership.

With gratitude,

The Development Team

Jewish Community Relations Council of New York

No goods or services were provided in exchange for this contribution. JCRC-NY is a tax-exempt organization; please retain this letter for your records.

[PLACEHOLDER TEMPLATE — replace with client-approved letterhead and content.]
